keyImprovements: Eliminated 3389 noise issues (71.6% reduction from 4732 → 1343) by disabling 19 Minor/Info CodeStyle and Documentation patterns per the 31% Critical+High noise floor.
Deduplicated 7 Bandit security patterns that were exact duplicates of Ruff patterns — same files and lines — keeping the higher-severity Ruff variant in each case.
Bandit retained for unique coverage: B603 (29 subprocess calls not caught by Ruff), B404 (16 subprocess import notices), and B108 (1 hardcoded temp dir).
Checkov brings 1358 IaC security patterns covering GitHub Actions workflows, YAML configs, and Python config files — confirmed clean with 0 issues.
Agentlinter (new to this repo) found 20 real agent-quality issues across 8 skill/agent spec files: missing escape hatches, metadata gaps, and security concerns.
Semgrep configured with 535 patterns but unavailable — install opengrep manually (brew or GitHub releases) to activate the largest security scanner in the suite.
